sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91537" key="puopoi/hsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠο-ποίησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n91537.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making of pus</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:3:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
